g.text: ● SCANNING PROCESSES · SHA-256 VERIFICATION · VIRUSTOTAL LOOKUP · YARA RULES · CLAMAV · SIGNATURE CHECK · LIVE MONITORING ●
GhostProcess is a dark-themed GUI process scanner that hunts malicious executables hiding in memory.
SHA-256 hashing · live threat intel APIs · YARA rules · slick Tkinter dashboard.
Suspects can be terminated, quarantined, and exported to PDF · JSON · CSV in one click.

◈ VirusTotal API ● SHA-256 Hashing ● Live Monitoring ● YARA Rules ● ClamAV Integration ● Authenticode Verify ● MalwareBazaar ● ThreatFox ● PDF Reports ● Baseline Drift Detection ● JSON/CSV Export ● Kill Process ● SQLite IOC DB ● Offline Mode ● Process Tree ◈
Enumerates · hashes · cross-references · classifies — all processes in parallel with ThreadPoolExecutor
— flat file or SQLite IOC store
Deep navy · Sky blue accent · Rose red alerts
Pure black · Teal matrix · Coral red alerts
Custom accent colors: Red · Cyan · Green · Purple · Orange · Amber · Blue · Teal · Indigo
ctypes + wintrust.dll used automatically for Authenticode — no extra setup needed.
tkinter is bundled with standard Python — no separate install required.
Keys stored locally — never transmitted except to their respective APIs.
API keys, theme, accent color, offline paths:
Known-clean hash store for drift detection:
Set your API key in the Settings tab
Click Scan — all processes enumerated and hashed
Kill · Rescan · Copy Hash · Open Location
Enable Live Monitor to catch new processes as they spawn
GhostProcess is intended for use on systems you own or have explicit authorization to analyze.
Unauthorized scanning is illegal. VirusTotal, MalwareBazaar, and ThreatFox terms of service apply.
VirusTotal file submission for unknown hashes
Tray icon for persistent background monitoring
Plugin system for custom intelligence sources
GhostProcess v1.0.0 · Python 3.10+ · VirusTotal · MalwareBazaar · ThreatFox · YARA · ClamAV · WinVerifyTrust · ReportLab · psutil · ThreadPoolExecutor · MIT License
